Miyuki Sawashiro (沢城 みゆき Sawashiro Miyuki, born June 2, 1985 in Tokyo) is a Japanese voice actress and singer who works for Mausu Promotion.

She voiced Puchiko in the English dubbed releases of Di Gi Charat the Movie and six of eight episodes of the OVA Leave it to Piyoko, making her one of the few Japanese voice actors to have reprised a role in English in addition to the original Japanese performance due to her spending time at a homestay program in America in her teens to learn the language. She was not able to record for the English dub of the Di Gi Charat TV series or the last two episodes of Leave it to Piyoko because of a scheduling conflict.

A selection of other characters voiced by Miyuki Sawashiro

Max Anarchy as Rin Rin
Angel Beats! as Masami Iwasawa
Bayonetta: Bloody Fate as Cereza
Bayonetta 3 as Viola
Catherine as Catherine
Corpse Party: BloodCovered as Ms. Yui Shishido
Danganronpa as Toko Fukawa/Genocide Jack
Deadman Wonderland as Toto Sakigami
Fate/Apocrypha and Fate/Grand Order as Mordred
Fire Emblem as Female Robin, Female Morgan and Camilla
Genshin Impact as Raiden Shogun
Go! Princess Precure as Cure Scarlet
Granblue Fantasy as Katalina
Nisemonogatari as Suruga Kanbaru
Strike Witches as Perrine-H. Clostermann
Zan Sayonara Zetsubō Sensei as Maria Tarō Sekiutsu
